---
title: "Grafik MBG 2"
author: "Muhammad Jodi At-Takbir"
date: "2025-12-07"
output: html_document
---


# Grafik
```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

# 1. Baca data
data <- read_excel("C:/Users/jodia/Downloads/Grafik Nasional.xlsx",
                   col_names = TRUE, sheet = "Beras") %>%
  mutate(
    Konsumsi = as.numeric(gsub(",", "", Konsumsi)),
    Produksi = as.numeric(gsub(",", "", Produksi)),
    Tahun = as.numeric(Tahun)
  )

# 2. Long format
data_long <- data %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Konsumsi, Produksi),
               names_to = "Variabel",
               values_to = "Nilai")

# 3. Pisahkan aktual & proyeksi
data_solid <- data_long %>% filter(Tahun <= 2024)
data_dash  <- data_long %>% filter(Tahun >= 2025)
data_join  <- data_long %>% filter(Tahun %in% c(2024, 2025))

# 4. Plot final
ggplot() +
  geom_line(data = data_solid,
            aes(Tahun, Nilai, color = Variabel),
            linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_line(data = data_join,
            aes(Tahun, Nilai, color = Variabel),
            linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_line(data = data_dash,
            aes(Tahun, Nilai, color = Variabel),
            linewidth = 0.9,
            linetype = "42") +
  geom_point(data = data_solid,
             aes(Tahun, Nilai, color = Variabel),
             size = 1.6) +

  scale_color_manual(values = c("Konsumsi" = "red",
                                "Produksi" = "blue"),
                     name = "Keterangan") +

  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2018:2030, labels = 2018:2030) +

  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = comma_format(accuracy = 1),  # angka fixed rapi
    n.breaks = 10
  ) +

  labs(
    title = "Grafik Konsumsi vs Produksi Beras Nasional (2018–2030)",
    x = "Tahun",
    y = "Ton/Tahun"
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )


```


# Generate ke excel
```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(stringr)

# Lokasi file
file_path <- "C:/Users/jodia/Downloads/Grafik Nasional.xlsx"

# Ambil nama semua sheet
sheets <- excel_sheets(file_path)

# Buat folder penyimpanan jika belum ada
dir.create("Grafik_Nasional", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Loop semua sheet
for (sheet in sheets) {

  data <- read_excel(file_path, sheet = sheet, col_names = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(
      Konsumsi = as.numeric(gsub(",", "", Konsumsi)),
      Produksi = as.numeric(gsub(",", "", Produksi)),
      Tahun = as.numeric(Tahun)
    )

  data_long <- data %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(Konsumsi, Produksi),
                 names_to = "Variabel",
                 values_to = "Nilai")

  # Pisahkan aktual & proyeksi
  data_solid <- data_long %>% filter(Tahun <= 2024)
  data_dash  <- data_long %>% filter(Tahun >= 2025)
  data_join  <- data_long %>% filter(Tahun %in% c(2024, 2025))

  # Buat grafik
  g <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = data_solid,
              aes(Tahun, Nilai, color = Variabel),
              linewidth = 0.9) +
    geom_line(data = data_join,
              aes(Tahun, Nilai, color = Variabel),
              linewidth = 0.9) +
    geom_line(data = data_dash,
              aes(Tahun, Nilai, color = Variabel),
              linewidth = 0.9,
              linetype = "42") +
    geom_point(data = data_solid,
               aes(Tahun, Nilai, color = Variabel),
               size = 1.6) +

    scale_color_manual(values = c("Konsumsi" = "red",
                                  "Produksi" = "blue"),
                       name = "Keterangan") +

    scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2018:2030,
                       labels = 2018:2030) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = comma_format(accuracy = 1),
                       n.breaks = 10) +

    labs(
      title = paste("Grafik Konsumsi vs Produksi", sheet, "(2018–2030)"),
      x = "Tahun",
      y = "Ton/Tahun"
    ) +

    theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
    )

  # Nama file aman (hapus karakter ilegal)
  safe_name <- gsub("[/:*?\"<>|\\\\]", "_", sheet)

  # Simpan
  ggsave(
    filename = paste0("Grafik_Nasional/", safe_name, ".png"),
    plot = g, width = 10, height = 5
  )

  cat("✓ Grafik selesai:", sheet, "\n")
}

cat("\n🎉 Semua grafik berhasil dibuat dan disimpan di folder: Grafik_Nasional\n")

```


```{r}
browseURL("Grafik_Nasional")

```
